landing.heroDesc: My Roomie matches you with compatible roommates based on your lifestyle, habits, and preferences — not just budget. Feel safe, matched, and understood.
landing.howItWorksDesc: Three simple steps to finding a roommate who truly fits your lifestyle.
landing.step1Desc: Tell us about your lifestyle, habits, and what matters to you in a roommate.
landing.step2Desc: Our smart algorithm finds people whose lifestyle is most compatible with yours.
landing.step3Desc: Chat with your matches, meet up, and find your new home together.
landing.whyChooseDesc: We're not a rental marketplace. We're a compatibility-driven roommate finder.
landing.feature1Desc: We analyze sleep schedules, cleanliness habits, noise tolerance, and more to find your ideal match.
landing.feature2Desc: Feel safe with our verification system. Know who you're connecting with before meeting.
landing.feature3Desc: Our algorithm learns your preferences and improves match quality over time.
landing.feature4Desc: Join a community of students and young professionals looking for compatible living situations.
landing.feature5Desc: Have an empty room? Post it and let compatible roommates find you.
landing.feature6Desc: Chat within the platform before sharing personal contact information.
landing.ctaTitle: Ready to Find Your Perfect Roommate?
landing.ctaDesc: Join thousands of students and young professionals who found their ideal living situation through My Roomie.

findPage.subtitle: Discover roommates who match your lifestyle and preferences.

premiumPage.msgConnectFind: Message, connect, and find your best match
premiumPage.boostListingDesc: Your listing will be prioritized and highlighted for 24 hours
premiumPage.unlockStudentContactsDesc: View phone numbers and emails to contact students directly
premiumPage.ctaDescStudent: Thousands of students have found their ideal roommate. It's your turn!
premiumPage.ctaDescLandlord: Boost listings, unlock contacts — fill your rooms quickly.
premiumPage.creditsNeverExpire: Boost credits never expire · Contacts unlocked forever
premiumPage.studentFaq1Q: Can I cancel my plan at any time?
premiumPage.studentFaq1A: Your plan remains active until it expires (7 days or 30 days). There is no auto-renewal.
premiumPage.studentFaq2Q: What's the difference between AI and non-AI plans?
premiumPage.studentFaq2A: AI plans use an AI algorithm to analyze lifestyle and preferences, then suggest the most compatible roommates. Non-AI plans let you search and message on your own.
premiumPage.studentFaq3A: That's the number of people you can message during your plan. For example, the 1-week plan allows messaging up to 15 different people.
premiumPage.studentFaq4A: We accept MoMo, ZaloPay, domestic bank cards, and bank transfers.
premiumPage.landlordFaq1A: When you boost a listing, it will be displayed as a priority on the front page for 24 hours, with a 'Boosted' badge, increasing views by up to 5x.
premiumPage.landlordFaq2Q: Can I use the 10-listing bundle gradually?
premiumPage.landlordFaq2A: Yes! You purchase the 10-listing bundle and use credits over time. Each boost deducts 1 credit. Credits never expire.
premiumPage.landlordFaq3Q: What does unlocking student contacts mean?
premiumPage.landlordFaq3A: Student contact info (phone, email) is hidden by default. You need to unlock it to view. The free plan includes 3 contacts — upgrade for more.
premiumPage.landlordFaq4A: No. Once you unlock a student's contact info, you can view it permanently.
premiumPage.reviewStudent1: The 1-month + AI plan helped me find a roommate in just 2 days. The AI suggestions were spot on!
premiumPage.reviewStudent2: Only 49k and I could message 15 people. Found a roommate with a perfectly matching personality.
premiumPage.reviewStudent3: I used the AI plan — it suggested 3 best matches, and I found the perfect roommate!
premiumPage.reviewLandlord1: Boosted for 24h and got 5 student inquiries right away. The 10-listing bundle saves so much more.
premiumPage.reviewLandlord2: The 30-contact pack is amazing value — only 99k and I could reach so many students. Rooms filled fast.
premiumPage.reviewLandlord3: My rooms are always full thanks to front-page boosting. Totally worth the investment.

footer.tagline: Find your perfect roommate based on lifestyle compatibility, not just budget.

bio.1: Friendly tech enthusiast who enjoys quiet evenings and weekend hikes. Looking for a respectful roommate to share a 2-bedroom apartment.
bio.2: Third-year business student at UD. I love cooking, reading, and having meaningful conversations. Looking for a female roommate.
bio.3: Working professional with a love for surfing and beach vibes. I'm organized, social, and easy-going. Open to sharing a modern apartment near the beach.
bio.4: Creative soul who works from home most days. I'm introverted but friendly. Looking for a calm and respectful roommate.
bio.5: Detail-oriented professional who keeps things tidy. I love board games and weekend brunches. Ideal roommate is someone reliable and fun.
bio.6: Passionate educator and traveler. I enjoy yoga, green tea, and weekend markets. Looking for a positive and open-minded roommate.
bio.7: Engineering student who loves gaming and hanging out with friends. I'm laidback and flexible with house rules.
bio.8: Design-focused professional who appreciates aesthetics and tidiness. I cook often and love a good Netflix marathon. Let's make our apartment feel like home!
bio.current: Looking for a compatible roommate in Da Nang. I'm tidy, friendly, and enjoy a good work-life balance.

r1.title: Sunny Studio near Dragon Bridge
r1.description:
Welcome to our sunny and spacious studio apartment located in the heart of Da Nang. Just a 5-minute walk to the iconic Dragon Bridge and surrounded by vibrant cafes and street food stalls. The apartment features large windows that let in plenty of natural light, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere.

Ideal for students or young professionals, the building is secure with 24/7 camera surveillance and key card access. We are located near Duy Tan University (1.5km) and the Han Market (1km).

r2.title: Modern Apartment in Hai Chau
r2.description: A beautifully designed modern apartment in the center of Hai Chau. Walking distance to cafes, restaurants, and the beach. Perfect for young professionals who appreciate contemporary living.

r3.title: Cozy Room near My Khe Beach
r3.description: Just 3 minutes walk from My Khe Beach! A cozy shared room perfect for beach lovers and students. The area is quiet and peaceful, with many local food options nearby.

r4.title: Premium Penthouse View
r4.description: Stunning penthouse with panoramic city views. Premium finishes throughout with smart home integration. Perfect for professionals who want the best living experience in Da Nang.

r5.title: Budget-Friendly Student Room
r5.description: Affordable student housing near Da Nang University of Technology. Simple but clean and comfortable. Great for students on a budget.

r6.title: Riverside Loft in Cam Le
r6.description: Beautiful riverside loft with stunning views of the Han River. Modern interior with an industrial-chic design. Quiet neighborhood perfect for remote workers.
